violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC instructed to use 3 bay sink to sanitize until unit is fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024
